name: piper-morgan
description: Bring your PM assistant into your own chat. Three layered skills over a local MCP server: meet-piper (learns how you work as a PM), ask-piper (relay a question to your local Piper Morgan), consult-piper (gather missing context from GitHub and re-ask, with honest provenance). Server-owned config works on every surface. Requires a local Piper Morgan server. Thin BYOC PoC.
